Statement of Objects and Reasons of Amending Act 
20 of 1987.-The Factories Act, 1948 provides for the 
health, safety, welfare and other aspects of workers in 
factories. The Act is enforced by the State Governments 
through their Factory Inspectorates. The Act also empowers 
the State Governments to frame rules, so that the local 
conditions prevailing in the State are appropriately reflected 
in the enforcement. The Act was last amended in 1976 
[2025] 3 S.C.R.  
353
The State of Goa & Anr. v. Namita Tripathi
